evidence.description: Masoud Khamenei is described as 'the husband of Sadiq-Kharazi's sister' — Sadegh Kharrazi is the son of Mohsen Kharrazi, making Masoud and Sadegh brothers-in-law.

editorial_notes: Masoud married Sadegh Kharrazi's sister (Mohsen Kharrazi's daughter), making them brothers-in-law. Subtype in-law used as the closest valid option for sibling-in-law.
